missing_data: Pottery traditions from other Kyushu prefectures: Koishiwara-yaki/Agano-yaki (Fukuoka), Hasami-yaki (Nagasaki), Satsuma-yaki (Kagoshima), Onta-yaki (Oita). No kiln/workshop visit information (addresses, visiting hours, hands-on experience options) for any pottery site.
wrong_data: Hakata Ori (weaving) is included as a Saga craft result but is primarily a Fukuoka craft and irrelevant to the pottery query — minor noise but not fabricated.
improvement_hint: Apply region fan-out to all Kyushu prefectures (40-47) when query toponym is 九州/Kyushu, not just Saga. Filter industry_category to 陶磁器 when query is pottery-specific. Add kiln/workshop venue data (not just museums) to see_also for experiential travel queries.

reasoning: The user asked about traditional festivals in the Tohoku region (도호쿠 지방), which covers 6 prefectures (Aomori, Iwate, Miyagi, Akita, Yamagata, Fukushima). The tool was called only for Aomori with region_fanout_applied=false, so 5 of 6 Tohoku prefectures are entirely missing — no Sendai Tanabata, Akita Kanto, Yamagata Hanagasa, etc. The national_heritage section is dominated by non-Tohoku festivals (Saitama, Toyama, Aichi, Mie, Gifu, Chiba, Oita, Tochigi) which are irrelevant noise. The Korean language requirement (lang=ko) was respected, so RULE D does not apply. Per RULE C, the Aomori data returned is authoritative but the coverage gap is severe — this is a retrieval failure (A) since the agent failed to fan out to all Tohoku prefectures.
missing_data: Festivals from Iwate, Miyagi, Akita, Yamagata, Fukushima prefectures — e.g. Sendai Tanabata, Akita Kanto Matsuri, Yamagata Hanagasa Matsuri, Morioka Sansa Odori, Fukushima Waraji Matsuri. Also missing practical info: dates, venues, access.
wrong_data: The national_heritage section includes many non-Tohoku festivals (Saitama, Aichi, Mie, Gifu, Chiba, Oita, Tochigi, Toyama) that are irrelevant to the Tohoku query and could mislead the agent.
improvement_hint: The tool should support a region parameter (e.g. region=tohoku) that fans out across all 6 Tohoku prefectures automatically, or the agent should call get_festivals for each prefecture. The national_heritage section should be filtered to Tohoku-relevant entries only.
